version_description: Has a more detailed chord approach, highlighting different bass chords and chords for Intro/Outro.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Can You Feel The Love Tonight

content:
Some uncommon chords are tabbed below the song for your reference.

=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+
***     YOU DECORATED MY LIFE     ***
***     Kenny Rogers  |  1979     ***
=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+=+

[Intro] 
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F#dim[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]B7[/ch] [ch]D/C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D/C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]C/G[/ch]
All my life was a paper, once plain, pure and white[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]GM7[/ch]
Till you moved with your pen changing moods now and then[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C/G[/ch]
Till the balance was right[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]C/G[/ch]
Then you added some music, every note was in place[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]GM7[/ch]                                        [ch]C/G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
And anybody could see all the changes in me by the look on my face[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
And you      decorated my life,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G/D[/ch]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Created a world    where dreams are a part[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
And you      decorated my life,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]             [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
By painting your love    all over my heart[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
You decorated my life[/tab]


[Interlude] 
[ch]F#dim[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]B7[/ch] [ch]D/C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D/C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]C/G[/ch]
Like a rhyme with no reason in an unfinished song[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]GM7[/ch]                                        [ch]C/G[/ch]
There was no harmony life meant nothin' to me, until you came along[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]C/G[/ch]
And you brought out the colors, what a gentle surprise[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]GM7[/ch]                                            [ch]C/G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Now I'm able to see all the things life can be shining soft in your eyes[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
And you      decorated my life,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G/D[/ch]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Created a world    where dreams are a part[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
And you      decorated my life,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]             [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
By painting your love    all over my heart[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
You decorated my life[/tab]


[Outro] 
[ch]F#dim[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]B7[/ch] [ch]D/C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D/C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]GM7[/ch]


***Illustrated CHORDS (EADGBe)***
x =dead/muted string   0 =open string

[ch]F#dim[/ch]   2xx212
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]     332010
GM7     320002, 35443x or xx5432[/tab]
[ch]Am/D[/ch]    xx0210
[ch]G/D[/ch]     xx0003
[ch]D/G[/ch]     3x0232
[ch]D/C[/ch]     x3x232


Enjoy!

++Daryl Kayanan++
++8.27.2019++
